[camera shakes] WORF: HULL BREACHES ON NINE DECKS DATA: Here's what happened: you told me to raise shields, and I didn't — Kyle Ferrana , @KyleTrainEmoji Tags: ai-misuse , coding-agents , ai , llms

a4875085b.title: GEM: Geometric Entropy Mixing for Optimal LLM Data Curation
a4875085b.body:
arXiv:2605.26121v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM pre-training efficacy increasingly depends on data composition rather than sheer volume. Yet, optimal mixing is hindered by categorization flaws: human taxonomies suffer from ontological misalignment, and Euclidean clustering fails to address embedding anisotropy. We introduce GEM (Geometric Entropy Mixing), a framework reformulating data curatio
